violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris on the bottom of the blade. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Proper cleaning procedure for slicer reviewed with PIC. Slicer must be sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen/ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Per PIC, tiles were recently installed. New tiles of approved material to be added as old tiles need to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in the back. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Per PIC, new hand sink will be installed in the back area. Dishes and utensils relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Various food was observed marked with a day or date that exceeds 7 days. PIC disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Thermometers to be added in units. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and reach in shelving have an accumulation of various debris. Areas to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
Various debris was observed surrounding the dumpster area. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen/ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Per PIC, tiles were recently installed. New tiles of approved material to be added as old tiles need to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, employees are currently due to test for food safety certificate. PIC to contact inspector with information on completed food safety course information. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back prep area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Thee handwashing sink in the back prep area is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster that designates a handwashing sink for employees to wash their hands shall be provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of the deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Deli slicer taken out of service until proper washed/rinsed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The door to the outside, located on the side wall of the building, is not tight-fitting at the base. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

At the time of inspection, the following areas of the physical facilities were observed to be in poor repair... - the ceiling in the kitchen/food prep area was observed to be in poor repair. Ceiling Tiles were observed to be stained and/or peeling. - several floor tiles were observed to be chipped exposing subfloor below The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

At the time of inspection, the Licensed Certified Food Safety Manager was not on site. Per the PIC, the State Licensed Food Safety Manager is currently out of work (not sure of return date). Per the PIC, multiple employees are to take food safety course/test on site. Application for RIDOH Certified Food Safety Manger License to be submitted immediately upon completion. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

At the time of inspection, the 2 bay sink in the back area used for food prep and handwashing was observed to be lacking a splash guard between the two sinks preventing possible contamination of foods and food contact surfaces in the the food prep sink at times of handwashing. Per the PIC, a new separate, dedicated hand sink is to be installed in the back prep room area Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

At the time of inspection, an employee certified in food safety was not on site. The establishment is to employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC is in process of getting someone else certified. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
Inspector observed utensils in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

Inspector observed food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
Inspector observed working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken and sausage was observed cooling on the counter in a plastic container greater than 4 inches. PIC informed and moved chicken and sausage to a aluminum 2 inch container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

The back area 2 Bay Prep Sink/Hand Sink was observed to be lacking a splash guard/divider preventing possible contamination of the food prep sink surfaces and/or foods in the prep sink while washing hands. The Mop Sink was also observed to be lacking a splash guard preventing possible contamination of clean utensils/equipment located on a storage rack directly next to the mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

Inspector observed knives being stored on an unclean surface under hot hold unit between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

The sink used for food preparation in the prep room is lacking a proper air gap. (At the time of inspection, the prep sink was observed to be equipped with an air break.) A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Inspector observed grease trap outside is located on gravel/grass The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
